ab: Hmuya ka karac saya?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: Pcriyu ka hidaw da, mtilux bay ka karac.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: Mskuy bay ka nganguc hu?
en: A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: Mskuy balay, plkusi ou hari lukus.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: Mtilux balay ka nganguc hu?
en: A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: Ini, msbwihur da, mtltu balay ka karac.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.

ab: Hmuya karac ka diyax saya?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: Ini kskuy mi ini ktilux uri ka karac saya, mndungus balay.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: Hmuya karac ka kman saya?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: Uka rulung ka karac, pcriyu ka pngerah da.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: Hmuya ka karac nganguc?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: Hana msuwan, msangay ka quyux da, thidaw da, pcriyu ka Hakaw Utux da.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: Hmuya ka karac isu hiya?
en: A: What's the weather like where you are?

ab: Wisu msbwihur beyhing ka yami hini.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: Ya mndungus ka karac isu hiya hu?
en: A: How's the weather there?

ab: Malu balay, thidaw beyhing bay hidaw.
en: B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: Musa ku sapah pyasan da.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: Mskuy balay ka karac, kou hari pnlkusan su lukus.
ch: B:天氣很冷，你要多穿衣服。
en: B: It's cold, you need to wear more clothes.

ab: Musa ku nganguc da.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: Mpquyux beyhing ka kiya da, iya bay chungi madas trasi ka isu.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.

ab: Mpquyux hu?
en: A: Is it going to rain?

ab: Hana mbruwa ka soni da, ya bay mosa qmuyux ka kiya hari da.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.

ab: Wisu qmuyux da hu?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: Qmnuyux ka soni, wisu msuwan ka saya da.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.

ab: Wisu qmuyux da hu?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: So bay qmnuyux da, mhuriq ka elu paru.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: Qmnuyux hu? Ma mhuriq kana ka hiyi su da?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: Wa qmuyux ka nganguc, ini ku adas trasi.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.

ab: Ya su wisu malu hu?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: Beyhing bay ka bwihur, maku so mnarux bay ka tunux mu nyupan bwihur.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: Ya su wisu malu hu?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: Beyhing bay ka hidaw, maku so mtnuwing balay ka tunux mu tnhdawan hidaw.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
